problem id: 0228335b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01000000 -> 00010010
  10110111 -> 11101000
  11010010 -> 10110010
  11110001 -> 01111011
  00001001 -> 01000010
  10101111 -> 11101110
  10111110 -> 10101010
  01100111 -> 11011010
  10010110 -> 10100001

query: 01100011
predicted answer: 11011011
